description: Model-specific repair rules for Qwen family models (Qwen2.5, Qwen-Max, QwQ, Qwen-Coder). Qwen tends to make fewer null/array errors than DeepSeek but has parameter naming quirks and string-number issues.

repairs._comment: Qwen sometimes sends 'folder' or 'directory' when tools expect 'path'
Qwen sometimes sends 'text' when tools expect 'content'
